benefits.description: Tirzepatide killed hunger and food noise with microdosing, no side effects
Retatrutide caused feeling full quicker but less complete appetite suppression than Tirzepatide

side_effects.description: Heart rate went up a bit on Retatrutide

protocol_notes: Microdosed Tirzepatide previously with good results and no side effects. Currently trialling Retatrutide; noticeable effects started at 3mg dose. Notes that Retatrutide has glucagon effect and only mildly suppresses hunger compared to Tirzepatide. Concerned about potential tolerance issues from previous Tirzepatide use.
